description: Reference capacities a relativeToThreshold target resolves against (§5.10/§5.11). One vocabulary shared by both the target's `of` and the ThresholdProfile entry's `kind`, so they match by equality. Casing follows the spec's examples (1RM, FTP, maxHR, pace).

tokens.label: One-Rep Max
tokens.description: Maximal single-rep load for a lift (scope via ThresholdProfile.for).

tokens.label: Anthropometric
tokens.description: A measured body dimension (limb length, height, wingspan) — scope via ThresholdProfile.for (§5.11/R16).
